message.content: This section provides a ranked data list (positions 11–30) of the top global mobile games for 2025. It answers retrieval questions regarding specific game titles, their associated developers/publishers, and primary genre classifications. The content is structured as a bilingual table mapping each numerical rank to an English game title, a Chinese developer/publisher name, and a Chinese genre tag (e.g., strategy, RPG, puzzle, casual, action, simulation, card, casino, word). It supports queries about the 2025 ranking position, studio attribution, or genre for the 20 listed titles, including *Mafia City*, *Wuthering Waves*, *Coin Master*, *Archero 2*, *Rise of Kingdoms*, and *MapleStory: Idle RPG*. The section contains no procedural instructions or analytical claims, functioning solely as a reference table. Key metrics: ranks 11–30. Date: 2025. Evidence type: structured ranked list.
